# url

**Instance Property**

The module’s URL.

## Declaration

```swift
var url: URL { get }
```

## Accessing module properties

- **bundleIdentifier**: The module’s bundle identifier.
- **isEnabled**: A Boolean value that indicates if the module is enabled.

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates if the module is enabled.
items.name: isEnabled
